code: import{getWithFallback,patchWithFallback,postWithFallback}from'./http';let techniciansDb=[{id:'1',name:'Técnico 1',email:'tec1@provedor.com',region:'Centro',available:true},{id:'2',name:'Técnico 2',email:'tec2@provedor.com',region:'Zona Sul',available:false}];export const fetchTechnicians=async()=>{return getWithFallback('/technicians',()=>[...techniciansDb],220);};export const createTechnician=async input=>{return postWithFallback('/technicians',input,()=>{const newItem={id:String(Date.now()),name:input.name.trim(),email:input.email.trim(),region:input.region,available:true};techniciansDb=[newItem,...techniciansDb];return newItem;},200);};export const toggleTechnicianAvailability=async id=>{return patchWithFallback(`/technicians/${id}/toggle-availability`,{},()=>{techniciansDb=techniciansDb.map(tech=>tech.id===id?{...tech,available:!tech.available}:tech);return[...techniciansDb];},160);};
